2019-T3-P6-S1.trunk: 时间从句+引语+倒装提示语：Whenever …, 「you quickly get into a lot of ethical questions,」 notes Tan Kiat How …
structure: 时间状语从句(Whenever)：Whenever decisions are based on masses of data
引语：you quickly get into a lot of ethical questions
倒装提示语：notes Tan Kiat How, chief executive of a Singapore-based agency …（= Tan Kiat How notes）
└ 同位语〔说明 Tan Kiat How〕：chief executive of a Singapore-based agency
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 agency〕：that is helping the government develop a voluntary code for the ethical use of AI
2019-T3-P6-S1.logic: Whenever 引导时间状语从句（每当…）；引语；notes + 主语 倒装；chief executive… 同位语，that 定语从句修饰 agency（help sb do）。
notes: Whenever 引导时间状语从句（每当…时）。
notes Tan Kiat How…：引语提示语的倒装（= … notes）；chief executive… 是其同位语。
that is helping the government develop…：that 定语从句修饰 agency；help sb do（帮助政府制定…）。

2019-T3-P3-S2.trunk: S+remain+表：humans remain fascinated by the idea of robots …（人类依然为「像人一样的机器人」这一构想着迷）
structure: 主句：Yet humans remain fascinated by the idea of robots …
├ 定语从句〔that，修饰 robots〕：that would look, move, and respond like humans（并列谓语 look/move/respond）
└ 形容词短语作定语〔修饰 robots〕：similar to those recently depicted on popular sci-fi TV series such as 「West world」 and 「Humans」
└ 过去分词作定语〔修饰 those〕：recently depicted on popular sci-fi TV series
2019-T3-P3-S2.logic: 主句 humans remain fascinated by the idea of robots；that 定语从句修饰 robots（并列谓语 look/move/respond）；similar to those… 形容词短语修饰 robots，其中 depicted… 过去分词定语修饰 those。
notes: remain fascinated by…：remain + 形容词（依然着迷于…）。
that would look, move, and respond like humans：that 定语从句修饰 robots（并列谓语）。
similar to those recently depicted…：similar to… 形容词短语作定语；depicted… 过去分词修饰 those（科幻剧中刻画的那些）。

2019-T3-P1-S2.trunk: S+V+O：the author produced a remarkable work of speculative fiction …（早在电灯泡发明之前，作者就写出了一部非凡的思辨小说）
structure: 状语：Even before the invention of the electric light bulb
主句：the author produced a remarkable work of speculative fiction …
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 work〕：that would foreshadow many ethical questions …
└ 不定式作定语(被动)〔修饰 questions〕：to be raised by technologies yet to come
└ 不定式作定语〔修饰 technologies〕：yet to come
2019-T3-P1-S2.logic: 主句 the author produced a work；that 定语从句修饰 work（预示许多伦理问题）；to be raised by… 不定式被动修饰 questions；yet to come 不定式修饰 technologies。
notes: that would foreshadow…：that 定语从句修饰 a work（一部…的作品）。
many ethical questions to be raised by technologies：to be raised 不定式被动作定语修饰 questions（将被…提出的问题）。
technologies yet to come：yet to come 不定式作定语（尚未到来的技术）。
